properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v2 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: God is able He will never fail He is almighty God Greater than all we seek Greater than all we ask He has done great things

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lifted up He defeated the grave Raised to life Our God is able In His name We overcome For the Lord Our God is able

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: God is with us God is on our side He will make a way Far above all we know Far above all we hope He has done great things

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: God is with us He will go before He will never leave us He will never leave us God is for us He has open arms He will never fail us He will never fail us

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: For the Lord Our God is able For the Lord Our God is able
